heading: Prohibition
label: 6849 Prohibition
text: In carrying out this part, the Secretary shall neither mandate nor preclude the use of a particular curricular or pedagogical approach to educating English learners.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 3127 and is classified to .section 3128 of Pub. L. 89–10section 6848 of this title
Amendments2015—(), substituted “English learners” for “limited English proficient children”.Pub. L. 114–95, § 3003l

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015
